hero.subtitle: An apartment immersed in Sardinian nature, just minutes from the most beautiful beaches of Ogliastra.

idealFor.title: Every type of guest
idealFor.couples: Couples looking for relaxation and romance between nature and sea
idealFor.families: Families who want space, comfort and safety
idealFor.beachLovers: Beach lovers drawn to the crystal-clear waters of Ogliastra
idealFor.remoteWorkers: Remote workers seeking peace and connectivity

features.title: Comfort and amenities
features.subtitle: Every detail is designed to make your stay unforgettable, combining authentic Sardinian character with modern comfort.

kitchen.title: Fully Equipped Kitchen
kitchen.description: Complete kitchen with all the appliances needed to cook Sardinian flavours

airConditioning.title: Air Conditioning
airConditioning.description: Air conditioning and heating for perfect comfort in every season

wifi.title: Fast WiFi
wifi.description: Stable high-speed internet connection for remote work and streaming

parking.title: Private Parking
parking.description: Private parking space included in the price, stress-free

location.title: Strategic Location
location.description: 8 km from the beaches of Cala Liberotto, in the peaceful village of Torpè

washingMachine.title: Washing Machine
washingMachine.description: Washing machine available for longer stays

smartTV.title: Smart TV
smartTV.description: Smart TV with Netflix, YouTube and major streaming platforms

terrace.title: Panoramic Terrace
terrace.description: Spacious terrace overlooking the Sardinian countryside, perfect for outdoor breakfasts

heating.title: Heating
heating.description: Heating system for cool Sardinian evenings

linens.title: Linens Included
linens.description: Bed and bath linens included in the stay price

excursions.title: Explore Ogliastra
excursions.subtitle: Beaches, caves, nuraghi, all within reach
excursions.excursionTipsText: Rent a car to explore freely. The most beautiful beaches are reached via unpaved roads: 4x4 or high-clearance vehicle recommended for Cala Goloritze.

calaGoloritze.name: Cala Goloritze
calaGoloritze.description: One of Italy's most beautiful beaches, with its iconic rock arch and crystal-clear waters. Accessible by foot or boat.

berchida.name: Berchida Beach
berchida.description: A wild beach with white sand dunes and Mediterranean scrub. Nearly deserted out of season.

calaBrandinchi.name: Cala Brandinchi
calaBrandinchi.description: Called 'Sardinian Tahiti' for its azure waters and brilliant white sand. One of Sardinia's most photographed beaches.

laCinta.name: La Cinta Beach
laCinta.description: A long sandy strip near San Teodoro, perfect for families with children.

nuragheLoelle.name: Nuraghe Loelle
nuragheLoelle.description: A well-preserved nuragic complex, testament to Sardinia's millennia-old civilisation.

gorropu.name: Gorropu Gorge
gorropu.description: Europe's Grand Canyon. An unforgettable trek among rock walls up to 500 metres high.

calendar.title: When are you coming
calendar.subtitle: Check availability and book your stay in Sardinia

errors.notAccessible: Calendar not accessible. Please make it public.

concierge.title: Virtual Assistant
concierge.subtitle: Ask me about the house, beaches, excursions and everything you need for your stay.
concierge.initialMessage: Hello! I'm the Domu Laura assistant. I can help you with information about the apartment, nearby beaches, or how to book your stay. What can I tell you?
concierge.errorMessage: I'm sorry, an error occurred. Please try again in a moment.
